entries.name: membership-process-renewals
entries.purpose: Hourly on the hour: create MembershipRenewal rows for memberships whose next_renewal_at has arrived + dispatch charge attempts.

entries.name: membership-retry-failed-renewals
entries.purpose: Hourly at :15: retry failed renewals whose next_attempt_at has arrived. Day+3 / +7 / +14 retry ladder.

entries.name: membership-expire
entries.purpose: Nightly 03:00 UTC: transition soft-cancelled memberships past their period end to expired.

entries.name: membership-expire-stale-passes
entries.purpose: Nightly 04:00 UTC: expire unconsumed passes past valid_until.

entries.name: membership-generate-monthly-statements
entries.purpose: Monthly on the 1st at 06:00 UTC: produce per-tenant membership statement PDFs for the previous month.
